channel.title: Machine Learning on Chau Ta
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Chau Ta

item.title: WhispBERT
item.description: A BERT-based multilabel classifier trained on anonymous social media posts to flag sensitive and high-risk mental health content.

item.title: Distributed Neural Network
item.description: A distributed neural network training system utilizing an elastic, fault-tolerant Parameter Server architecture over gRPC.
